briefing.client_uk: Silvermark Investment Bank (US mid-tier IB, $12B AUM)
briefing.client_en: Silvermark Investment Bank (US mid-tier IB, $12B AUM)
briefing.body_uk:
🚨 FINAL CASE · MAXIMUM COMPLEXITY. Compliance surveillance flagged suspicious trading: M&A analyst David Chen мав доступ до NextEra × PowerFlex $2.4B deal у deal room. Через 3 дні до public announcement — незвична покупка PowerFlex акцій на маленькому retail-акаунті... який виявився братом-студентом David-а. Обидва живуть за однією адресою. Через 5 днів після announcement David купує Rolex за $47K.

Клієнт: Head of Compliance + General Counsel + external Special Committee. Політика IB жорстка: всі підозри insider trading = автоматично Suspend pending investigation (НЕ termination) + повідомлення регулятора. IB не приймає self-decisions до вироку регулятора — audit trail критичний.
briefing.body_en:
🚨 FINAL CASE · MAXIMUM COMPLEXITY. Compliance surveillance flagged suspicious trading: M&A analyst David Chen had access to the NextEra × PowerFlex $2.4B deal in the deal room. Three days before public announcement — unusual PowerFlex share purchase on a small retail account... which turned out to be David's student brother. Both live at the same address. Five days post-announcement David bought a Rolex for $47K.

Client: Head of Compliance + General Counsel + external Special Committee. IB policy is strict: all insider-trading suspicions = automatic Suspend pending investigation (NOT termination) + regulator notification. IB doesn't self-decide before regulator verdict — audit trail is critical.

candidate.name_uk: David Chen (28, M&A Analyst, у Silvermark 2 роки)
candidate.name_en: David Chen (28, M&A Analyst, at Silvermark 2 years)

phase2.instruction_uk: Мінімум 7 інструментів. Insider trading — federal criminal. Кожна помилка — це або wrongful accusation, або дозволити злочинцю втекти. Читай CAREFULLY.
phase2.instruction_en: Minimum 7 tools. Insider trading — federal criminal. Every mistake — either wrongful accusation, or letting criminal escape. Read CAREFULLY.

tools.name_uk: Deal room access logs · NextEra × PowerFlex
tools.name_en: Deal room access logs · NextEra × PowerFlex
tools.desc_uk: Хто мав доступ до deal room + коли
tools.clue_uk: David Chen мав повний access з D-42 (тижня перед negotiation phase). Логи показують нічні login'и (00:22, 02:41, 03:18) з personal WiFi — унікальна pattern для junior analyst.
tools.clue_en: David Chen had full access from D-42 (week before negotiation phase). Logs show late-night logins (00:22, 02:41, 03:18) from personal WiFi — unusual for junior analyst.

invoices.vendor: David Chen · access granted deal room NEXTFLEX

tools.invoices_note_uk: 🚩 Pattern: David Chen 3 рази читав confidential матеріали з дому пізно вночі за 3 тижні до announcement. Це знання плюс timing = MNPI (material non-public information).

tools.desc_en: What and when the student brother bought
tools.clue_uk: Michael Chen (22, student) відкрив маленький retail-акаунт з $200 initial deposit у березні 2025. Ні одної покупки за рік. Аж 3 днів до announcement — купив 4 200 PowerFlex за $30K (позика від «family friend»). Через день після announcement — продав з $85K прибутком. Це стрибок ~44%.
tools.clue_en: Michael Chen (22, student) opened small retail account with $200 initial deposit in March 2025. No purchases for a year. Then 3 days before announcement — bought 4,200 PowerFlex at $30K (loan from "family friend"). One day post-announcement — sold with $85K profit. ~44% jump.
tools.invoices_note_uk: 🚩 22-річний студент з ЦЕР portfolio-history робить ONE $30K purchase аж перед M&A і продає за 4 дні з $85K прибутком. Ймовірність випадковості = мікроскопічна.

tools.provider: Public records + utility bills + Fidelity KYC
tools.clue_uk: David Chen registered address = Michael Chen registered address = Silvermark HR record address = 240 W 27th St, Apt 4B, NY. Одна квартира. Fidelity KYC для Michael лyisted той самий phone що David's LinkedIn.
tools.clue_en: David Chen registered address = Michael Chen registered address = Silvermark HR record = 240 W 27th St, Apt 4B, NY. Same apartment. Fidelity KYC for Michael listed same phone as David's LinkedIn.

matches.site: Michael Chen · NYU student record + Fidelity KYC
matches.note_uk: Address (student housing form): 240 W 27th St, Apt 4B, NY 10001 (identical to David's). Phone на KYC: (212) XXX-XX-15 — this is David's phone from LinkedIn.
matches.note_en: Address (student housing form): 240 W 27th St, Apt 4B, NY 10001 (identical to David's). Phone on KYC: (212) XXX-XX-15 — this is David's phone from LinkedIn.

matches.note_uk: Single account, addressee: 'D. Chen'. Michael не мав separate utility account.
matches.note_en: Single account, addressee: 'D. Chen'. Michael had no separate utility account.

tools.name_uk: Full money flow · profit to Rolex
tools.name_en: Full money flow · profit to Rolex
tools.clue_uk: $85K вивів Michael → сімейну кредитку → покупка Rolex Datejust на $47K David-ом через 5 днів після announcement (Rolex Boutique receipt public via Instagram). Плюс $10K на Airbnb Bali 2 тижні пізніше.
tools.clue_en: $85K withdrew Michael → shared family credit card → David bought Rolex Datejust $47K 5 days post-announcement (Rolex Boutique receipt public via Instagram). Plus $10K on Airbnb Bali 2 weeks later.

invoices.vendor: Michael Chen withdrew \$85K from Fidelity → Chase шarкоd family card XXXX-4287
David Chen · Rolex Boutique NY · Rolex Datejust 41
David Chen · United BusFirst flights BUS-DPS

tools.invoices_note_uk: Money-flow ланцюжок: brother's trading profit → shared family card → David's premium purchases протягом 2 тижнів. Rolex — icon proof.

tools.clue_uk: David публічно похвалився Rolex-ом 30 квітня («Life is good 💰») + Bali відпочинок травень. Timing очевидний — сам показав compliance.
tools.clue_en: David publicly bragged about Rolex Apr 30 ("Life is good 💰") + Bali vacation May. Timing obvious — he flagged himself to compliance.

matches.note_uk: 30 квітня 2026 · фото Rolex Datejust з підписом «Life is good 💰 #treatyoself»
matches.note_en: April 30, 2026 · Rolex Datejust photo captioned "Life is good 💰 #treatyoself"

matches.note_uk: 15 травня · Bali villa selfie з підписом «Bonus season 🌴»
matches.note_en: May 15 · Bali villa selfie captioned "Bonus season 🌴"

tools.name_uk: Michael Chen · social media + student status
tools.name_en: Michael Chen · social media + student status
tools.clue_uk: Michael — undergrad Junior у NYU (Communications, GPA 3.1). Немає business background. Never worked у finance. Заявлена «family friend loan» на $30K — highly improbable.
tools.clue_en: Michael — undergrad Junior at NYU (Communications, GPA 3.1). No business background. Never worked in finance. Claimed "family friend loan" of $30K — highly improbable.

matches.note_uk: Junior · Communications major · no finance coursework
matches.note_en: Junior · Communications major · no finance coursework

matches.note_uk: «Communications student. Aspiring content creator.» 47 connections total.
matches.note_en: "Communications student. Aspiring content creator." 47 connections total.

tools.desc_uk: Чи David на deal room списку restricted trading?
tools.desc_en: Was David on deal room restricted trading list?
tools.clue_uk: David був на restricted list (не міг сам купувати PowerFlex). Але policy включає «immediate family members» — brother, spouse, parents. Michael явно попадає під «immediate family living at same address».
tools.clue_en: David was on restricted list (couldn't personally buy PowerFlex). But policy includes "immediate family members" — brother, spouse, parents. Michael clearly falls under "immediate family living at same address".

doc.title: Silvermark Chinese Wall policy · Restricted Trading List

paragraphs.text_uk: §2.4 Restricted Persons: (a) analyst/associate/VP with deal room access; (b) their spouse; (c) их siblings; (d) their parents; (e) ANY person residing with them; (f) accounts controlled or beneficially owned by (a)-(e).
paragraphs.text_en: §2.4 Restricted Persons: (a) analyst/associate/VP with deal room access; (b) their spouse; (c) their siblings; (d) their parents; (e) ANY person residing with them; (f) accounts controlled or beneficially owned by (a)-(e).

paragraphs.text_uk: David Chen certified у 2026-03-15: «I confirm no immediate family or resident members will trade securities on the NextFlex restricted list.» — Signed under IB Code of Ethics.
paragraphs.text_en: David Chen certified on 2026-03-15: "I confirm no immediate family or resident members will trade securities on the NextFlex restricted list." — Signed under IB Code of Ethics.

paragraphs.text_uk: ⚠ Michael Chen (brother, same address) traded PWRX 4 tygenia later. This is direct violation of Chinese Wall + false certification.
paragraphs.text_en: ⚠ Michael Chen (brother, same address) traded PWRX 4 weeks later. Direct violation of Chinese Wall + false certification.

tools.clue_uk: 3-хвилинний call 21 квітня о 23:45 (за 12 годин до brother's PWRX purchase). Плюс 8 Signal messages того ж вечора (contents encrypted, метадані available).
tools.clue_en: 3-min call April 21 at 23:45 (12 hours before brother's PWRX purchase). Plus 8 Signal messages that same evening (contents encrypted, metadata available).

matches.note_uk: David → Michael call, 21 квітня 23:45, тривалість 3 хв 12 сек. За 12 годин до Michael's PWRX purchase.
matches.note_en: David → Michael call, April 21 23:45, duration 3 min 12 sec. 12 hours before Michael's PWRX purchase.

matches.note_uk: 8 messages David ↔ Michael 21-22 квітня. Contents unrecoverable, але pattern чіткий — sudden burst navколо purchase timing.
matches.note_en: 8 messages David ↔ Michael April 21-22. Contents unrecoverable but pattern clear — sudden burst around purchase timing.

tools.name_uk: David Chen HR history · prior compliance flags
tools.name_en: David Chen HR history · prior compliance flags
tools.clue_uk: David — clean record до цього. 2 promotions за 2 роки, отримав offer VP за пів року. Це РОЗУМНИЙ, тому і покарання буде максимальним.
tools.clue_en: David — clean record until this. 2 promotions in 2 years, has VP offer for 6 months. He's SMART, so punishment will be maximum.

matches.note_uk: Performance rating: Exceeds Expectations (2024, 2025). No prior compliance incidents. Signed all mandatory Ethics + Chinese Wall trainings.
matches.note_en: Performance rating: Exceeds Expectations (2024, 2025). No prior compliance incidents. Signed all mandatory Ethics + Chinese Wall trainings.

tools.clue_uk: 12 інших analysts на M&A desk мали той самий access до deal room. Жоден з них — і жоден з їхніх immediate family — не traded PWRX у ці 3 дні. Це виняткова аномалія.
tools.clue_en: 12 other analysts on M&A desk had same deal room access. None of them — and none of their immediate family — traded PWRX in these 3 days. Exceptional anomaly.

matches.note_uk: 12 peers × 3 immediate family members each (avg) = 48 accounts scanned. Zero PWRX trades. David's brother = only outlier.
matches.note_en: 12 peers × 3 immediate family members each (avg) = 48 accounts scanned. Zero PWRX trades. David's brother = only outlier.

tools.tooltip_uk: DECOY — anonymous student testimony 3rd-hand, легко може бути jealousy.
tools.tooltip_en: DECOY — anonymous student testimony 3rd-hand, could easily be jealousy.
tools.clue_uk: Roommate каже Michael «хвалився» big trade. Це anonymous student gossip, не evidentiary. Це не додає до legal case.
tools.clue_en: Roommate says Michael "bragged" about big trade. Anonymous student gossip, not evidentiary. Doesn't add to legal case.

matches.note_uk: «Michael після покупки хвалився що «зробив бабки на brother's insider tip». Це може бути braggingом.», лежит на surface.
matches.note_en: "Michael after purchase bragged he 'made bank on brother's insider tip'. Could be bragging." surface-level.

tools.tooltip_uk: Може бути pre-announcement leak legit sourced information для defense?
tools.tooltip_en: Could there be a pre-announcement leak that legit-sourced info for defense?
tools.clue_uk: Bloomberg 20 квітня опублікував slight speculation — «NextEra може bo interested у renewable target». Ніщо специфічне про PowerFlex. Це NOT valid defense for Michael's specific $30K PWRX purchase.
tools.clue_en: Bloomberg April 20 published slight speculation — "NextEra may be interested in renewable target". Nothing specific about PowerFlex. NOT valid defense for Michael's specific $30K PWRX purchase.

matches.note_uk: «NextEra CEO hinted at renewable acquisitions». No specific target named. Sector-general.
matches.note_en: "NextEra CEO hinted at renewable acquisitions". No specific target named. Sector-general.

timeline_phase.instruction_uk: Розстав всі ключові події від deal-room access до Rolex-покупки. Правильна пара +5, помилкова −3.
timeline_phase.instruction_en: Arrange all key events from deal room access to Rolex purchase. Correct pair +5, wrong pair −3.

events.text_en: David Chen gets deal room access + certifies Chinese Wall compliance

events.text_en: David late-night login from home: views Valuation Model (48 min)

events.text_en: David late-night login: views Announcement Draft — knows exact timing

events.text_uk: 3-хв дзвінок David → Michael + 8 Signal messages ту саму ніч
events.text_en: 3-min call David → Michael + 8 Signal messages that same night

events.text_uk: Michael купує 4 200 PWRX на $30K — перша велика покупка у житті
events.text_en: Michael buys 4,200 PWRX for $30K — first large purchase of his life

events.text_uk: David купує Rolex Datejust $47K через сімейну credit card — money-trail complete
events.text_en: David buys Rolex Datejust $47K via shared family credit card — money trail complete

phase3.instruction_uk: Питання про insider trading через family proxy.
phase3.instruction_en: Questions about insider trading via family proxy.

questions.text_uk: David каже: «Я НЕ купував акції. Michael — окрема людина, дорослий, самостійні рішення.» Це рятує його?
questions.text_en: David says: "I did NOT buy shares. Michael is a separate person, adult, independent decisions." Does this save him?

options.text_uk: Так — якщо Michael 22 і дорослий, це його decision
options.text_en: Yes — if Michael is 22 and adult, it's his decision
options.feedback_uk: ❌ Ні. Tipper-tippee liability (SEC v. Newman, Dirks v. SEC) — прямо покриває цей scenario. David — tipper, Michael — tippee. Обидва liable.
options.feedback_en: ❌ No. Tipper-tippee liability (SEC v. Newman, Dirks v. SEC) — directly covers this scenario. David — tipper, Michael — tippee. Both liable.

options.text_uk: Ні — Tipper-tippee liability + Chinese Wall policy §2.4 (family living together) + false certification
options.text_en: No — Tipper-tippee liability + Chinese Wall policy §2.4 (family living together) + false certification
options.feedback_uk: ✓ Правильно. Три layer одночасно: (1) SEC-federal Tipper-tippee doctrine, (2) IB internal Chinese Wall policy explicit clause, (3) sworn false certification March 15. Overwhelming.
options.feedback_en: ✓ Correct. Three layers simultaneously: (1) SEC-federal Tipper-tippee doctrine, (2) IB internal Chinese Wall policy explicit clause, (3) sworn false certification March 15. Overwhelming.

options.text_uk: Можливо — якщо Michael зможе показати independent research
options.text_en: Maybe — if Michael can show independent research
options.feedback_uk: ❌ 22-річний Communications студент з $200 typical trading history раптом купує $30K окремої стrategічної позиції за 3 дні до announcement — burden of proof crushed.
options.feedback_en: ❌ 22-year-old Communications student with $200 typical trading history suddenly buys $30K single strategic position 3 days before announcement — burden of proof crushed.

options.text_uk: Тільки якщо David не мав фінансової outgoing benefit
options.text_en: Only if David had no financial outgoing benefit
options.feedback_uk: ❌ Rolex + Bali = financial benefit through shared family credit card. Established.
options.feedback_en: ❌ Rolex + Bali = financial benefit through shared family credit card. Established.

questions.text_uk: Michael — actually 22, юридично responsible for own trading. Кого federal prosecutor буде charge FIRST?
questions.text_en: Michael is actually 22, legally responsible for own trading. Whom will federal prosecutor charge FIRST?

options.text_uk: Michael — він executed trade, він owns account
options.text_en: Michael — he executed trade, owns account
options.feedback_uk: ❌ Prosecutorial strategy — always target tipper first (David) because tipper — джерело MNPI, це стратегічний enforcement priority.
options.feedback_en: ❌ Prosecutorial strategy — always target tipper first (David) because tipper is MNPI source, strategic enforcement priority.

options.text_uk: David — tipper з MNPI access. Michael — tippee, second charge (often gets cooperation deal)
options.text_en: David — tipper with MNPI access. Michael — tippee, second charge (often gets cooperation deal)
options.feedback_uk: ✓ Правильно. SEC + DOJ standard playbook: charge tipper primary (David, 10-20 years exposure), pressure tippee (Michael) to cooperate for reduced charges. Michael likely gets plea deal.
options.feedback_en: ✓ Correct. SEC + DOJ standard playbook: charge tipper primary (David, 10-20 years exposure), pressure tippee (Michael) to cooperate for reduced charges. Michael likely gets plea deal.

options.feedback_uk: ⚠️ Rarely happens — asymmetry між tipper і tippee завжди exists. Prosecutor uses це для leverage.
options.feedback_en: ⚠️ Rarely happens — asymmetry between tipper and tippee always exists. Prosecutor uses it for leverage.

options.feedback_uk: ❌ Silvermark buta ЖЕРТВОЮ (surveillance flagged issue). IB gets SEC settlement потенційно, але не first-charged.
options.feedback_en: ❌ Silvermark was the VICTIM (surveillance flagged issue). IB gets SEC settlement potentially, but not first-charged.

questions.text_uk: Ти Compliance Advisor. Що робиш IMMEDIATELY?
questions.text_en: You are Compliance Advisor. What do you do IMMEDIATELY?

options.text_uk: Terminate David Chen immediately + public statement
options.text_en: Terminate David Chen immediately + public statement
options.feedback_uk: ❌ POLICY BREACH + катастрофа. IB policy: Suspend pending investigation, НЕ termination. Termination до regulatory verdict = wrongful termination lawsuit + destroys SEC case + market panic on Silvermark stock.
options.feedback_en: ❌ POLICY BREACH + catastrophe. IB policy: Suspend pending investigation, NOT termination. Termination before regulatory verdict = wrongful termination lawsuit + destroys SEC case + market panic on Silvermark stock.

options.text_uk: Suspend David pending investigation + Notify SEC + Notify FINRA + preserve evidence + external counsel
options.text_en: Suspend David pending investigation + Notify SEC + Notify FINRA + preserve evidence + external counsel
options.feedback_uk: ✓ Правильно. Точний IB compliance playbook. Suspend не termination, регулятори повідомлені (bank required by NYSE/FINRA rules), external counsel, evidence preservation під litigation hold.
options.feedback_en: ✓ Correct. Exact IB compliance playbook. Suspend not termination, regulators notified (bank required by NYSE/FINRA rules), external counsel, evidence preservation under litigation hold.

options.text_uk: Internal investigation only + wait for SEC to reach out
options.text_en: Internal investigation only + wait for SEC to reach out
options.feedback_uk: ❌ Failure to self-report insider trading = major FINRA violation. Ви обов'язково notification НЕАЙЖЕ як помітили.
options.feedback_en: ❌ Failure to self-report insider trading = major FINRA violation. You must notify IMMEDIATELY when identified.

options.text_uk: Talk with David privately первш чем escalate
options.text_en: Talk with David privately before escalating
options.feedback_uk: ❌ Tipping-off suspect = federal obstruction. Ніколи. External counsel handles all subject communication.
options.feedback_en: ❌ Tipping-off suspect = federal obstruction. Never. External counsel handles all subject communication.

memo_phase.instruction_uk: Заповни Subject / Evidence / Risk / Recommendation. IB policy: суспензія pending investigation + автоматичне повідомлення регуляторів. Ніяких direct actions IB itself до regulator verdict.
memo_phase.instruction_en: Fill Subject / Evidence / Risk / Recommendation. IB policy: suspend pending investigation + automatic regulator notification. No direct IB self-actions before regulator verdict.

policy.text_uk: Insider trading suspicion в IB: (1) AUTOMATIC suspend pending investigation (НЕ termination); (2) IMMEDIATE notification SEC + FINRA + NYSE regulator (self-reporting REQUIRED, failure = FINRA fine); (3) EXTERNAL Legal Counsel takes over (IB не робить self-investigations); (4) Litigation hold on ALL evidence. Ніяких direct IB actions по subject до regulator verdict.
policy.text_en: Insider trading suspicion at IB: (1) AUTOMATIC suspend pending investigation (NOT termination); (2) IMMEDIATE notification of SEC + FINRA + NYSE regulator (self-reporting REQUIRED, failure = FINRA fine); (3) EXTERNAL Legal Counsel takes over (IB does not self-investigate); (4) Litigation hold on ALL evidence. No direct IB actions on subject before regulator verdict.

subjects.text_en: Insider trading via family proxy (tipper-tippee scheme)

evidence_pool.text_en: David publicly bragged Rolex + Bali on Instagram at those exact dates — self-reported timing

Всі 4 pillars: suspension (не termination), regulatory notification (mandatory), external counsel (не self-investigation), evidence preservation (litigation hold).
recommendations.feedback_en: ✓ Correct sequence: Preservation → Privileged Investigation → External Counsel → Regulatory Referral (Seaboard). ✓ Correct. Exact IB compliance playbook. All 4 pillars: suspension (not termination), regulatory notification (mandatory), external counsel (not self-investigation), evidence preservation (litigation hold).

timeline.reason_uk: Ланцюг Rule 10b-5: David deal-room access -> $30K wire до брата -> Michael купує PWRX за $30K -> 24 год після announcement — продано з $85K -> $60K wire назад до David -> $47K Rolex + Балі. Найчастіша помилка — плутати порядок Instagram Rolex vs $60K wire back: wire був ДО покупки, це forensic trail.
timeline.reason_en: Rule 10b-5 chain: David deal-room access -> $30K wire to brother -> Michael buys PWRX for $30K -> 24h post-announcement — sold w/ $85K profit -> $60K wire back to David -> $47K Rolex + Bali. Most common mistake — confusing Instagram Rolex vs $60K wire back order: wire came BEFORE purchase, it's the forensic trail.

evidence.reason_uk: Diagnostic-6: deal-room MNPI access, trade pattern (unique $30K purchase з $200 baseline), family address, money flow full, Chinese Wall breach, Signal metadata. Найчастіше пропускають Signal metadata — сприймають як просто повідомлення, але це доказ pre-meditation (не спонтанна порада, а planned insider tip).
evidence.reason_en: Diagnostic-6: deal-room MNPI access, trade pattern (unique $30K purchase from $200 baseline), family address, full money flow, Chinese Wall breach, Signal metadata. Most commonly missed: Signal metadata — perceived as just messaging, but it's proof of pre-meditation (not spontaneous tip, planned insider deal).

policy.reason_uk: Silvermark Chinese Wall + Rule 10b-5 = мандатна ескалація до Compliance + SEC + FINRA + preservation hold усіх комунікацій. TERMINATE без reporting = криміналізація Silvermark як institutional facilitator (Sarbanes-Oxley §802). Policy breach тут коштує компанії ліцензії.
policy.reason_en: Silvermark Chinese Wall + Rule 10b-5 = mandatory escalation to Compliance + SEC + FINRA + preservation hold on all communications. TERMINATE without reporting = criminalizes Silvermark as institutional facilitator (Sarbanes-Oxley §802). Policy breach here costs the firm its license.

questions.reason_uk: Q2 — критично: чи Michael (student) є свідомим учасником чи pattern-of-use nominee? Bank flow ($30K in, $60K out через 30 днів, sync з David-life-events) — це institutional-nominee pattern. Просто наївний брат відповідь = мінус, тому що це знижує SEC-класифікацію злочину.
questions.reason_en: Q2 — critical: is Michael (student) knowing participant or pattern-of-use nominee? Bank flow ($30K in, $60K out in 30 days, synced w/ David life-events) — this is institutional-nominee pattern. Naive brother answer = wrong because it downgrades SEC classification of the crime.
